diagrams.title: Enum Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows how enums relate to Java class hierarchy
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that enums are special classes with fixed instances

diagrams.title: Enum Internal Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of enum with fields, constructor, and methods
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that enums can have the same features as classes

diagrams.title: Enum values() and valueOf() Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how values() and valueOf() methods work
elements: values() -> returns array of all constants in order
valueOf(String) -> searches by name, returns matching constant or throws exception
diagrams.purpose: Remembering the two most important enum methods
